title: Experiment with zone-tinted overview rendering
description: Try coloring Overview by zone: components inherit their zone palette, outgoing edges inherit the source component's zone palette, and zone overlay boxes use the same palette when the zone Add info overlay is enabled.
decision_notes: Implemented as an experimental renderer styling layer, not as DSL semantics.
Overview nodes receive zone-scoped CSS variables for node fill/stroke/label.
Overview edges receive zone-scoped CSS variables based on the source node's zone.
When the zone overlay is active in Overview, zone boxes reuse the same palette so boxes, nodes, and outgoing edges agree visually.
The change is intentionally isolated through renderDiagram style maps and src/views/zone-colors.ts so it can be removed if the visual direction is rejected.
